scenario: Investigator-Initiated Trial Proposal — academic proposes their OWN study and asks for drug supply + funding.
input_text:
SOURCE CHANNEL: Email

Dear CardioMed Scientific Affairs,

Our group at the University of Michigan would like to propose an investigator-initiated study evaluating CholoClear-X in patients with chronic kidney disease and mixed dyslipidemia. We are seeking study drug supply and partial grant funding to run this independent single-center trial. Attached is a one-page concept; we'd welcome your support.

Prof. Ananya Rao, MD PhD
Division of Nephrology, University of Michigan
labeling_notes: Unsolicited proposal from an independent investigator seeking funding/drug supply for their OWN research = IIT.
Not a medical inquiry and not a trial WE run — Investigator-Initiated.
